posts.author: 2025meli (Ian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Vibe apps should have versioning feature for rollback and also duplication.

What are you trying to achieve

  1. We need urgently Vibe to be able to version the apps so that if something goes wrong we can restore.

  2. We also need functionality to duplicate a vibe app so that we can shape a second app similar to the first and jumpstart and keep consistency.

posts.author: amichay (Amichay Even Chen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! We just released versioning options for vibe apps
You can click “Undo this” to revert the last change, or click on the version icon on the topbar to revert to an older version

image1348×580 84.8 KB

image1024×585 88 KB

posts.author: 2025meli (Ian)
posts.cookedHtml: I confirm I’ve been using this immediately and it works greatly! Thanks for your quick response!!!
